name: The Box
effect: Invoke unconventional thinking. This card is considered innovative.

clauses.name: OUTSIDE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a stakeholder says 'think outside the box': The box is considered the deliverable.

clauses.name: REBOXING EFFECT
clauses.rule: When an unconventional idea is presented: It is placed back inside the box for further review.

clauses.name: BOX PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the box is questioned: The box is retroactively described as a framework.

witness_quote: We need to challenge our assumptions here.
